item.description:
Release v4.12.0

Changes since v4.11.0

  • bugfix: fix a bug
  • docs: remove completed LSP cache task from roadmap
  • docs: remove completed main-thread-concurrency-roadmap
  • docs: remove completed TreeSitter optimization from performance analysis
  • docs: update performance analysis by removing completed optimizations
  • feat: add performance test switches for file tree scrolling optimization
  • feat: add StepFun LLM provider plugin
  • feat: add Sublyx API key missing error rendering
  • feat: add Sublyx LLM provider plugin
  • feat: allow LLM to customize timeout for run_command tool
  • feat: remove Availability tab from ModelSelectorPlugin popover
  • feat: update AgentRulesPlugin localization strings
  • feat(file-tree): add key logging points to NodeView (verbose mode)
  • feat(file-tree): add SuperLog configuration to NodeView
  • feat(file-tree): optimize performance and enhance UX for VS Code-like experience
  • feat(LLMProviderMLX): add Intel Mac platform detection
  • feat(MessageRenderer): show friendly tool descriptions instead of raw names
  • feat(SublyxProvider): add superlog to log HTTP error responses
  • fix: add missing LLMProviderStepFunPlugin dependency to LumiPluginRegistry
  • fix: add missing view components and API key methods for StepFun plugin
